events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes terminations & splices observed during in-service operation. Readings are steady, no abnormal sound or heat, maintenance log shows standard functional check completed with no open punch note. Reference: NEC 110.14.

This seems like a pass condition - everything is normal, no defects noted.
